title: Da'Gara's worldship
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
The '''worldship under Prefect Da'Gara''' was the first [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] to enter [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at [[Vector Prime]].

==History==
Moving ahead of the main [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|worldship convoy]], the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] was secretly ferrying members of the [[Praetorite Vong]] (as well as their [[yammosk]]) into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to begin the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] ahead of schedule, so that the Praetorite Vong would be able to dictate the course of the invasion. The [[Extragalactic Society|ExGal]] scientists at [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] tracked the worldship's vector to [[Helska IV]].

Assuming the vessel was an asteroid, they were surprised when Helska 4 was not shattered when the "asteroid" entered the atmosphere. [[Danni Quee]] and two others decided to go and investigate the event. The worldship was presumably destroyed during the [[Battle of Helska IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
